# Method

This chapter verifies a second figure, a second table, and a wide table. Figure
\ref{fig-wide} represents a wide visual case. @tbl-wide represents a broad data
case that may require rotated-table behavior.

\begin{figure}
\centering
\fbox{\begin{minipage}{0.92\linewidth}
\centering
\vspace{1cm}
Metadata \hfill Markdown \hfill LaTeX \hfill PDF
\vspace{1cm}
\end{minipage}}
\caption{A second long wide-system caption for checking English figure labels, list wrapping, and page-number alignment in the rendered list of figures.}
\label{fig-wide}
\end{figure}

| Step | Input | Action | Output |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Source files | Quarto render | LaTeX |
| 2 | LaTeX | LuaLaTeX and Biber | PDF |

: A multi-step render table. {#tbl-render}

| Field | Title | Advisor | Co-advisor | Committee | Bibliography | Appendices |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| State | Long | Long | Present | Five members | BibLaTeX | Present |
| Expected | No overflow | Legible | Legible | Fits | Clean | Ordered |

: Wide-table fixture data with multiple columns. {#tbl-wide}
